intro: Researchers have identified why large language models repeatedly generate the same fictional names: statistical patterns in training data create predictable outputs rather than random variation. Claude Guillemot, co-founder of video game company Ubisoft, died in a plane crash at age 69. GLM-5.2, a new open-source Chinese AI model designed for long-form coding tasks, is gaining attention among Silicon Valley developers.
